stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced accelerated production of its Blackwell AI chips amid surging demand from hyperscalers. Economic implications include boosted capex in AI infrastructure, enhancing GDP growth via tech investment. Market psychology: FOMO driving retail inflows, fear of missing AI boom. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 GPU shortage rally. Analogies: 1) Like oil boom fueling energy stocks in 1970s. 2) Dot-com era chip makers during internet buildout.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal positive analyst upgrades post-announcement; X sentiment (semantic search) shows 85% positive posts on AI dominance, high engagement on production ramp.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long NVDA for 6-10% gains in 1 week on momentum; target $145.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short, high short squeeze risk; potential 2% loss if delay rumors.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Supply chain disruptions, competition from AMD/Intel, overvaluation bubble burst.

stocks.justification: Strong news flow, high X volume, historical patterns confirm.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla reported Q1 deliveries below expectations due to Cybertruck ramp issues and competition. Economic: Signals slowing EV adoption, pressure on auto sector margins. Psychology: Profit-taking after rally, bearish memes on X. Parallels: 2022 delivery miss led to 65% drop. Analogies: 1) Like GM in 2008 crisis. 2) Blockbuster ignoring streaming shift.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News highlights miss vs estimates; X keyword search shows negative sentiment spike, #TeslaMiss trending with high replies.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long on dip for 3% rebound if Robotaxi hype returns.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 7-12% downside to $155, high conviction.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Elon Musk tweet reversal, China demand surprise, regulatory tailwinds.

stocks.justification: Clear miss but volatile stock, sentiment mixed long-term.

stocks.impact_theory: SMCI guided above expectations on AI server orders tied to NVDA chips. Implications: Amplifies AI capex cycle. Psychology: Momentum chase in small-cap AI plays. Parallels: 2023 server demand surge. Analogies: 1) Caterpillar in infrastructure boom. 2) Foundry suppliers in chip wars.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat headlines; X semantic shows hype around 'next NVDA', positive retweets.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 8-15% to $1000 on volume surge.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Accounting concerns, dependency on NVDA, high valuation.

stocks.justification: Direct tie to NVDA news, strong guidance.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple faces EU antitrust fine over App Store; signals regulatory risks to services revenue. Implications: Margin compression in high-profit segment. Psychology: Rotation out of megacaps. Parallels: Google fines impact. Analogies: 1) Tobacco settlements hurting margins. 2) Utility regulations capping growth.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Regulatory news dominant; X posts critical of monopoly, moderate negative sentiment.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Appeal success, AI features announcement offset.

stocks.justification: Regulatory noise but core business strong.

stocks.impact_theory: Palantir wins major DoD AI contract expansion. Implications: Validates gov commercial pivot, recurring revenue growth. Psychology: Meme stock revival. Parallels: 2021 contract wins. Analogies: 1) Lockheed in defense spending upcycle. 2) Snowflake post-IPO hype.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Contract news viral on X, high faves on gov AI posts.

stocks.justification: Solid contract but profitability concerns linger.
